---
title: "Tennis Momentum Dashboard"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: fill
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(shiny)
library(flexdashboard)

streaks <- readRDS("streaks.rds")
```

Sidebar {.sidebar}
-------------------------------------

```{r}
selectInput(
  "player",
  "Select Player:",
  choices = c("All", sort(unique(streaks$winner_name))),
  selected = "All"
)

sliderInput(
  "min_streak",
  "Minimum Streak Length:",
  min = 1,
  max = max(streaks$streak_length, na.rm = TRUE),
  value = 5,
  step = 1
)
```

Row
-------------------------------------

### Streak Distribution

```{r}
renderPlot({
  data <- streaks
  
  if (input$player != "All") {
    data <- data %>% filter(winner_name == input$player)
  }
  
  ggplot(data, aes(x = streak_length)) +
    geom_histogram(binwidth = 1) +
    labs(
      title = "Distribution of Streak Lengths",
      x = "Streak Length",
      y = "Frequency"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
})
```

### Long Streaks

```{r}
renderTable({
  data <- streaks
  
  if (input$player != "All") {
    data <- data %>% filter(winner_name == input$player)
  }
  
  data %>%
    filter(streak_length >= input$min_streak) %>%
    arrange(desc(streak_length)) %>%
    select(winner_name, streak_length, loser_name, match_id) %>%
    head(15)
})
```

Row
-------------------------------------

### Top Players by Average Streak

```{r}
renderPlot({
  streaks %>%
    group_by(winner_name) %>%
    summarise(avg_streak = mean(streak_length), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(avg_streak)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 10) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(winner_name, avg_streak), y = avg_streak)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(
      title = "Top 10 Players by Average Streak",
      x = "Player",
      y = "Average Streak Length"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
})
```

### About

This dashboard explores point-winning streaks in tennis.  
Use the sidebar to filter by player and minimum streak length.
